reviews.comment:
Todos los servicios para el viajero sin tener que entrar a la ciudad, sin embargo los precios son demasiado altos y abusivos. Los baños como siempre, sucios y fríos, poco adecuados para el uso y la zona.

(Translated by Google)
All the services a traveler needs are available without having to enter the city; however, the prices are excessively high and exorbitant. The restrooms, as always, are dirty and cold, unsuitable for the area and its use.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRdDh2REJBEAE
